metadata.notes: Country-level static dataset for first demo web application.

application_fee.notes: Government student visa fee per year.

legal_work_hours_per_week.source: Assumption based on common practice for student visas; Sri Lanka does not explicitly state work-hours limit.
legal_work_hours_per_week.notes: Assumed limit of 20 hours/week during study, similar to other countries.

application_fee.notes: Residence visa fee for employees (USD 200 converted at 309.56 LKR/USD).

duration_years.notes: Residence visa is valid for one year and renewable.

application_fee.notes: Residence visa fee applicable to employees/investors (USD 200 converted to LKR).
Golden Paradise long-term residence visa costs USD 2,000 for 10-year validity (approx. 619k LKR).

estimated_processing_years.source: Assumption based on typical processing times; no exact figure provided.

annual_tuition_fee.notes: Average annual tuition for private universities; international students pay USD 1,000–3,000 per year. Using midpoint of USD 1,000–3,000 range multiplied by 309.56 exchange rate.

graduate_annual_salary.notes: Average software engineer salary according to PayScale.

mid_level_annual_salary.notes: Estimated mid-level salary using compiled.lk data (~200k LKR per month).

annual_salary_growth_rate.notes: Assumed 6% salary growth based on minimum wage increase from 27k to 30k (about 11%) in 2025–2026.

hourly_wage.notes: Minimum wage of Rs135 per hour used as typical student part-time wage.

annual_salary.notes: Average net monthly salary of LKR 66,638 converted to annual figure.

effective_income_tax_rate.notes: Average effective tax rate estimated at 20% based on progressive PIT brackets from 6% to 36%.

single_monthly.notes: Numbeo estimated monthly costs for a single person excluding rent.

couple_monthly.source: Assumption based on double the single cost with economies of scale.

family_with_one_child_monthly.source: Assumption derived from family-of-four cost (550,637 LKR) scaled for three persons.
family_with_one_child_monthly.notes: Estimated family expenses excluding rent and childcare.

single_monthly.notes: Average of 1-bedroom apartment rent in city centre and outside centre (112,962 and 51,776 LKR).

family_monthly.notes: Average of 3-bedroom apartment rent in city centre and outside centre (251,241 and 81,019 LKR).

monthly_cost_per_child.notes: Numbeo ranking shows private preschool/kindergarten cost of USD 35.07 per month; converted using 309.56 LKR/USD.

public_transport_monthly.notes: Monthly public transport pass costs around USD 5 according to Wise, converted to LKR.

monthly_cost.notes: Sri Lanka provides universal free public health care; hence minimal private health cost assumed for locals.

used_car_purchase_price.notes: Approximate price for a used compact car considering import restrictions causing new cars to cost 8–10 million LKR.

annual_insurance.notes: Reddit discussion noted a Rs.10M car's insurance starts around 200k per year; assuming 100k for a 5M used car.

annual_fuel.notes: Estimated using petrol price ~450 LKR per litre and 1,000 litres per year (12,000 km at 12 km/l).

annual_maintenance.source: Assumption based on 3% of car value for maintenance.
annual_maintenance.notes: Approximate annual maintenance for a used car.

car_loan_interest_rate.notes: SBI Sri Lanka fixed car loan rate of 11% per annum.

inflation_rate.notes: Headline inflation year-on-year in May 2026 was 5.5%.

savings_interest_rate.notes: 12-month term deposit interest rate of 7.25% at SBI Sri Lanka.

investment_return_rate.source: Assumption based on moderate investment return.
investment_return_rate.notes: Used to grow investments in model.

lkr_to_lkr_exchange_rate.notes: Exchange rate from LKR to LKR is 1.

education_loan_interest_rate.notes: People's Bank education loan interest rate range 13–14.5%; using 14%.

migration_loan_interest_rate.source: Assumption based on education loan rates due to similar unsecured loan structures.
migration_loan_interest_rate.notes: Assumed same as education loan interest rate.

loans_and_debt.notes: If cash becomes negative, convert it into explicit debt instead of silently allowing negative cash.

sources.notes: Store URLs or citation labels here.
